global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'EarnPath' logo positioned in the top left corner. The main message is conveyed through a prominent headline stating 'Secure & simple Fast signup' and supporting body text 'instant card' centered below it. A call-to-action button labeled 'Order now' is located at the bottom center. The layout is complemented by abstract shapes and a segmented crop that add visual interest without overwhelming the main content.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with vibrant colors
global.main_message: Encourages quick and easy signup for financial services.

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, displayed in the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad encouraging users to take action, located centrally.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An abstract design featuring a large circle and a smaller rectangle, positioned in the center of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A blue rectangular area with no visible elements or text.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest promoting easy signup for financial services.
